name.en: Bad End the Mad Fiend of Despair
name.ja: <ruby>絶<rt>ぜつ</rt></ruby><ruby>望<rt>ぼう</rt></ruby><ruby>狂<rt>きょう</rt></ruby><ruby>魔<rt>ま</rt></ruby>バッド・エンド

requirement.en: Shuffle 4 Spell/Trap Cards from your Graveyard into the Deck.

effect.en: Destroy 1 Spell/Trap Card on your opponent's field. Then, if you have 6 or more monsters with the same Attribute in your Graveyard, you can Special Summon 1 Level 7 or lower monster from your opponent's Graveyard face-up to your field.
